name: Nice & Easy Nicoise Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 lb (4 medium) potatoes - cut into 1/4-inch slices
2 cans Tuna packed in water - (6 1/8 ounces each) - thoroughly drained
3/4 cup Red wine vinaigrette - dressing (prepared) - divided
8 oz Frozen whole green beans, thawed and drained - (half a 16-ounce package)
1 can Pitted ripe olives, drained - (3 1/4 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a shallow 1 1/2- to 2-quart microwave-safe dish. Cover with plastic wrap, venting one corner. Microwave on HIGH for 8 to 10 minutes until tender; cool.
2. In separate bowls, lightly toss potatoes and tuna with 2 tablespoons vinaigrette each. Set aside.
3. Line a platter with lettuce.
4. Arrange the cooled potatoes, tuna, and remaining ingredients (except vinaigrette) on the lettuce.
5. Drizzle with the remaining vinaigrette.
